plugins.name: Text Selection
plugins.description: Yomitan-based text selection — dom-text-scanner / text-source-* / string-util bundled by CI.
plugins.author: DaLang

settings.label: Scan length
settings.description: How many characters to read starting at the cursor — the most a single lookup can capture.

settings.label: Scan delay (ms)
settings.description: How long to wait after the cursor stops moving before scanning. Higher values use less CPU; 0 scans continuously.

settings.label: Selection method
settings.description: How the scanned text is split into the word to look up: a single character, a MeCab token's dictionary form, or a MeCab lemma by character.

settings.label: Layout-aware scan
settings.description: Respect the page's line and block breaks so a scan doesn't run text together across separate elements.

settings.label: Deep DOM scan
settings.description: Also look through overlapping and nested elements at the cursor, not just the topmost one. More thorough but slower.

settings.label: Normalize CSS zoom
settings.description: Adjust for CSS page zoom so the correct text is detected on zoomed pages.

settings.label: Scan on hover
settings.description: Scan the word under the cursor as you move the mouse.

settings.label: Sentence context length
settings.description: How many surrounding characters to include as sentence context with each result. 0 turns sentence context off.

settings.label: Scan non-CJK text
settings.description: Also scan Latin letters and numbers. Turn off to scan only Japanese, Chinese, and Korean text.

settings.label: Highlight selected text
settings.description: Highlight the matched word on the page using the browser's text selection.

settings.label: Scan without mouse move
settings.description: Re-scan at the last cursor position when the tab regains focus, without moving the pointer.

plugins.name: YouTube Subtitles
plugins.description: Reads .ytp-caption-segment nodes on YouTube and emits subtitles via da.emit('subtitles'). Pushes on MutationObserver so live captions stream in real time.
plugins.author: DaLang

plugins.name: MeCab Furigana
plugins.description: Annotates visible Japanese text with furigana ruby tags using da.host.mecab.
plugins.author: DaLang
